value.string: Assigning the path values to a string variable
Reading the all rows in the excel Config file
Select the Config file to read all user details
Extracting Excel Table and Embed to Email body

value.expression:
from xlsx2html import xlsx2html from bs4 import BeautifulSoup outputfile="$sOuthtmlFile$" xlsx2html("$sInputExcelFile$", outputfile) data = open(outputfile).read() soup = BeautifulSoup(data, 'html.parser') table = soup.find('table') emailcontent = '$configDictionary{MailMessage}$
$configDictionary{MailSignature}$
$configDictionary{TableHeading}$
'+table.prettify() + '
' with open("$sOutEmailbody$", 'w') as text_file: text_file.write(emailcontent)

variables.description: A variable you can use for assignments
variables.name: prompt-assignment
